summary: 8 film announcements, 5 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Summoner
film.announcement: Kevin Bacon set to star in horror thriller directed by Jeremy Slater.

film.title: Forgotten Island
film.announcement: DreamWorks animated film casts Filipina superstar Lea Salonga as main villain in project described as a love letter to Filipino culture.

film.title: Berlinweh – Yearning for a Home
film.announcement: Director Agnieszka Holland to helm Marlene Dietrich biopic.

film.title: Twisted
film.announcement: Former Disney animator Lino DiSalvo goes behind the scenes as director of indie animated feature.

film.title: Kung Fu Soccer
film.announcement: Stephen Chow closes international rights deal for Shaolin Soccer spinoff, marking his return to the sport genre over two decades later.

film.title: I Know Who You Are
film.announcement: China Lion takes North American distribution rights for Feng Xiaogang's film.

film.title: Mio
film.talent: Director: Jonathan Berlin; Cast: Taddeo Kufus, Barbara Auer, Godehard Giese
film.announcement: German actor Jonathan Berlin makes his directorial feature debut with Mio.

film.title: Steps
film.announcement: Netflix animated film adaptation sneak peeked at Annecy, focusing on Cinderella's so-called evil sisters.

tv.title: The Young Magicians
tv.talent: Nick Mohammed (based on his book series)
tv.announcement: Ted Lasso star Nick Mohammed developing animated series from his Young Magicians kids books with BBC Studios and Blink Industries.

tv.title: Possession
tv.announcement: Gugu Mbatha-Raw leads Sky's limited series set between Bristol and Jamaica.

tv.title: Please Hag
tv.announcement: Passion Paris joins ADN for South Korean Webtoon adaptation of Please Hag.

tv.title: Join the Club
tv.announcement: Walmart launches new TV series Join the Club for Vizio users.

tv.title: Backyard Escapes
tv.announcement: Walmart launches new TV series Backyard Escapes for Vizio users.
